game_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns vehicle handling and driver character traits (Ace, Wild Bill, Steeler, Clutch)
Navigation through geographical locations (woods, desert, arctic tundra)
Dynamic threats during one-on-one combat scenarios
Learning character-specific advantages/disadvantages (speed vs. weapon power tradeoffs)
Encounter with named antagonists (Destro, Baroness, Zartan, Firefly, Cobra Commander, Storm Shadow, Major Bludd, Scrap-Iron)
Game cannot be completed if too many members of either side are jailed; requires resource management

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating cycles between vehicular traversal (moderate tension) and direct melee combat (high tension); geopolitical location transitions provide pacing breaks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to vehicle selection and overhead control scheme; geography variation establishes environmental complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Character-specific tradeoffs and Cobra operative encounters increase strategic depth; automated weapons introduce dynamic threat level
difficulty_curve.late_game: Resource management constraint (jailing mechanic) requires tactical positioning to prevent unrecoverable game states
notable_spikes: First Cobra operative encounter introduces melee combat tempo shift
Zartan encounter (disguise mechanic) elevates opponent unpredictability
Late-stage jailing threshold pressure forces tactical caution

notable_level_patterns.description: Alternating sequence: overhead vehicular traversal through geographical location → destination-triggered melee battle with Cobra operative → return to vehicle selection or next location
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Woods region (vehicular phase) leading to Duke vs. Destro (melee phase)

notable_level_patterns.description: Three distinct environmental biomes (woods, desert, arctic tundra) structure progression and visual/mechanical variety
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Arctic tundra provides terrain-specific obstacles versus desert open-space navigation

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 12 playable Joes presents speed/power tradeoff requiring matchup consideration against opponent type
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Snake Eyes (speed) vs. Major Bludd could differ from Torpedo (power) vs. Major Bludd tactical outcomes

notable_level_patterns.description: Permutation constraint: game becomes unwinnable if either side has too many members jailed; creates strategic depth in early captures
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early Cobra captures must preserve team viability across all eight target operatives

sources_used: wikipedia: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (video game)
